summary: Find Configurable Field Set by Index
description: Returns the details for a specified Configurable Field Set if found. If not, template of type Field Set will be returned with ID null.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: The type of Configurable Field Set

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: Project ID that is associated to the Configurable Field Set, if applicable

parameters.name: scope[category]
parameters.description: Category or observations_category_id are required for an Observations Configurable Field Set (0 = quality, 1 = safety, 2 = commissioning, 3 = warranty, 4 = work to complete)

parameters.name: scope[observations_category_id]
parameters.description: Category or observations_category_id Required for an Observations Configurable Field Set

parameters.name: scope[inspection_type_id]
parameters.description: Required for an Inspection Configurable Field Set. If a value is provided, only field set of the specific Inspection type is returned. If no value is provided, only field set of unassociated Inspec...

parameters.name: scope[generic_tool_id]
parameters.description: Required for a Generic Tool Item Configurable Field Set (type of ConfigurableFieldSet::GenericToolItem)

parameters.name: scope[action_plan_type_id]
parameters.description: Required for an Action Plans Plan Configurable Field Set (type of ConfigurableFieldSet::ActionPlans::Plan)

id.description: The unique identifier of the configurable field set.

name.description: The name of the configurable field set.

type.description: The type of configurable field set

category.description: Specifies the category for the configurable field set if it exists or an empty string. This property was added for the ConfigurableFieldSet::Observations::Item class.

class_name.description: Specifies the class the configurable field set is associated with.

fields.description: Specifies the hash of fields on an object. This is for example purposes only.

visible.description: If this property is set to true, the field is visible. If this property is set to false, the field is not visible.

required.description: If this property is set to true, the field is required, if the property is set to false, the field is not required.

custom_field_1.description: Custom Field object for an existing custom field in this configurable field set object.

id.description: The metadatum identifier of the custom field.

name.description: The name of the custom field.

company_id.description: The company identifier of the custom field.

label.description: The label of the custom field definition.

description.description: The description of the custom field definition.

custom_field_definition_id.description: The definition identifier of the custom field.

data_type.description: Data type of the custom field.

variant.description: The variant type of the custom field.

custom_fields_section_id.description: The section identifier of the custom field.

default_value.description: The default value of the custom field.

host_type.description: The host type of the custom field.

position.description: The display position of the custom field, which is sorted ascending, lowest position is visually the top left of the page on a grid basis (used in conjunction with column_width property to calculat...

required.description: If this property is set to true, the custom field is required. If this property is set to false, the custom field is not required.

visible.description: If this property is set to true, the custom field is visible. If this property is set to false, the custom field is not visible.

row.description: The number of the row where the custom field is positioned on the form.

column.description: The number of the column where the custom field is positioned on the form.

column_width.description: The number of columns the custom field spans on the form.

sections.description: An array of sections that are used for custom fields.

id.description: The unique identifier of the section.

position.description: The display position of the section, which is sorted ascending, lowest position is visually the top of the page.

from_v1_custom_fields.description: If field was migrated from a v1 custom field.

inspection_type_id.description: The unique identifier of the inspection type.

generic_tool_id.description: The unique idenfitier of the generic tool.

action_plan_type_id.description: The unique idenfitier of the action plan type.

observations_category_id.description: The unique idenfitier of the observations category.

projects.description: An array of projects that are associated with the configurable field set.

id.description: The unique identifier of the project.
